title: AstralCore v2
description: AstralCore v2 is an edited version of AstralCore, featuring the white default-style clouds from Complementary for a refreshed visual look.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ke9vEybfjso" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[![YT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f48639fd7b91b3a2c29f76ac474ba419a01a109.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GlacierServicesMC)





### ABOUT

**AstralCore v2 is a white-cloud variation of AstralCore Shaders, an edit of Complementary Unbound made by EMIN GT. It keeps the same pink-toned atmosphere of AstralCore but replaces the clouds with Complementary’s default white style, designed for players who enjoy the dreamy pink aesthetic while preferring a cleaner sky.**

### Features

**AstralCore v2 keeps most core features of Complementary Unbound but introduces a balanced mix of AstralCore’s dreamy pink tones with Complementary’s classic white clouds. It’s perfect for players who enjoy the vibrant AstralCore atmosphere while preferring a cleaner, more natural sky aesthetic.**

### BUGS

**Found a bug? You can report it by creating a ticket under the bug category in our Discord server. Your feedback helps us improve Astral Core and fix issues faster. Every report means a lot to us and truly makes our day better!**

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c952a5d53a7af1439b21e9a934efd0ef66cf42a4.png)

**OFFER!!**

![offer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c2601c81bad72a543406e08506cd532288fc150.png)
